metadata.description: SkyyRose private marketplace — the autonomous luxury-streetwear suite: an orchestrator plus marketing, design, core-engineering, and QA plugins, each grounded in verified vendor docs and wired to the SkyyRose Elite Studio runtime + dev-team pipeline.

plugins.name: skyyrose
plugins.description: Orchestrator — classifies a task and routes it to the right SkyyRose plugin(s); runs the dev-team workflow for multi-step work. Front door: /skyyrose <task>.

plugins.name: skyyrose-market
plugins.description: Marketing & commerce team: brand DNA, product copy, WooCommerce SEO, Klaviyo email flows, paid media, influencer growth, photography briefs, launch orchestration, and 30+ social skills.

plugins.name: skyyrose-design
plugins.description: Design & build: imagery (gpt-image-2 prompt composition + brand-native element library), frontend, Three.js, immersive 3D, WordPress/WooCommerce theming, accessibility, and layout.

plugins.name: skyyrose-core
plugins.description: Engineering core: FastAPI/Python backend, Postgres/Redis, Alembic migrations, Docker, API design, behavior/token discipline, planning, and memory & self-healing.

plugins.name: skyyrose-qa
plugins.description: Quality & verification: TDD, drive-to-green, verification loops, audits, evals, regression testing, and code review.
